---
name: Bug report
about: Something does not work as expected with the n8n-nodes-dng package
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
---

> Before opening a bug, please confirm the issue is **about the candidate-side
> n8n-nodes-dng package**, not the DraftNGoal scoring service. For scoring or
> account problems, contact <support@dng.ai>.
>
> Security issues must follow [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md). Do **not** post
> a security report here.

## Environment

- `n8n-nodes-dng` version: <!-- e.g. 1.0.0 -->
- n8n version: <!-- e.g. 1.70.0, self-hosted via Docker -->
- OS: <!-- macOS / Linux / Windows -->
- Node.js (only if you ran `npm run build` locally): <!-- e.g. 20.11.0 -->

<!-- Step-by-step. Include the challenge id and the DNG nodes you placed on the canvas. -->

## What actually happened?
